decisions.decision: Phase 12 marked COMPLETE (seam scope delivered+verified); real data-fetch routed to NEW Phase 13
decisions.rationale: Seam was the phase scope; the data-fetch contract was a wrong Phase-11 assumption = new scope

decisions.decision: Real listing query is qid a5cb7fa004b5e4b5 with request.routeParameters{geoId,contentType:'attraction',webVariant:'AttractionsFusion',filters} + sessionId; parse data.Result[0].sections[] SingleFlexCardSection
decisions.rationale: Live-validated 2026-06-24 (HTTP 200, 314KB, real attractions). The {locationId,offset,limit} shape and the spike-recorded qids (ads/trips/telemetry) were all wrong.

decisions.decision: Wire attractions first; destinos contentType confirm-then-wire; most_recent_review_at prefer null-at-Nascente
decisions.rationale: attraction path is the validated one; don't block on unconfirmed variants

next_action: Verify Phase 13 plans: spawn gsd-plan-checker (or re-run /gsd:plan-phase 13 which resumes at the verification loop). Then /gsd:execute-phase 13. context_notes: Long session: executed Phase 12 fully, then drove Level-3 UAT live with the user's real browser captures. The big discovery: the lane never actually collected data — the Phase-11/spike queryIds were telemetry/ads/trips, mislabeled. Found the REAL AttractionsFusion query (a5cb7fa004b5e4b5) and validated it returns real attraction cards. Phase 13 is now a low-risk wiring job with a fully-characterized contract in GAP-12-A-FINDINGS.md. Memory 'tripadvisor-graphql-real-shape' updated with the correction + real qid.
